misc: Runs his mouth all the time
Constantly sees birds and other wildlife on the course
Might stand on the ball for quite some time in the tee box
biography: Juuso, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings his unique brand of enthusiasm to the Hyvinkään Golf team. A talkative player, Juuso is known for his colorful commentary and keen observations on the course. He has a knack for spotting wildlife, often pointing out birds and other creatures to his fellow competitors.

With eight past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Juuso's experience is undeniable. While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his dedication to the sport is clear. He is always looking for ways to improve his game and contribute to his team's success. This year marks his ninth appearance.

Opponents should be prepared for Juuso to spend a considerable amount of time on the tee box. Some might even say that he stands on the ball for quite some time, carefully planning his next move. Whether this is a strategic tactic or simply a part of Juuso's quirky personality is a matter of debate, but it certainly adds to the entertainment value of watching him play.
